quote: Prematurite helped us understand the basics of premature baby care in simple language. It gave our family better clarity before speaking with our doctor.
author: A Mother from Vadodara

quote: The explanation of corrected age saved us so much worry. We were comparing our child to full-term milestones, but the resources here explained the right math.
author: A Father from Pune

quote: Entering the NICU was terrifying. The guides explaining common hospital equipment and terms helped us feel like partners in our baby's care rather than outsiders.
author: A Parent from Bengaluru

quote: The checklists for doctor visits are extremely practical. We were able to write down our questions in advance and get specific guidelines from our neonatologist.
author: A Family Caregiver from Surat

quote: Having a structured guide on how to prepare the home environment and restrict visitors safely helped us explain things to our extended family in a polite, objective way.
author: A Mother from Ahmedabad

quote: The kangaroo care instructions were very helpful. It explained the safety precautions clearly and gave my husband the confidence to participate in skin-to-skin bonding.
author: A Parent from Mumbai
role: Parent of twins born at 33 weeks

quote: We appreciated the strong focus on pediatrician guidance. The site does not make false medical claims; it simply educates and guides you back to your clinical team.
author: A Father from Chennai

quote: The transition to home was made much easier with the post-discharge advice. Knowing how to maintain a sanitation station and check room temperature was key.
author: A Mother from Kolkata

quote: The resources on feeding cues helped us observe our baby more closely at home. Our pediatrician was impressed by the detailed feeding logs we kept.
author: A Family Caregiver from Hyderabad

quote: An excellent digital library that is focused entirely on parent education. The warm tone is very supportive during a stressful time in our lives.
author: A Parent from Jaipur
